query:
SELECT 
  ft.id,
  ft.userId,
  ft.deviceType,
  ft.platform,
  ft.isActive,
  ft.lastUsed,
  ft.createdAt,
  LEFT(ft.fcmToken, 30) as tokenPreview
FROM fcm_tokens ft
ORDER BY ft.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
